titleStmt.title: SII 39.51: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 51. (A.R. No. 51 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. •••••••••• ŚAKA 1[4]73 (1581 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of temple car (tiruttēr) to the temple at Tirukkōlakkuḍi by certain Nagarattār of Iḷaiyāttakkuḍi alias Kulaśēkharapuram in Kalvāśal-nāḍu, in return for they were honoured with Parivaṭṭam, Tirumālai in the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakāttam 147 10 3 mel cellāniṉṟa cātāruṇa varuṣam vaiy
kācil 10- § puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḻakkuṭi Āṇṭa nayiṉār koyil śrī paṇ
ṭārak kāriyattukku kaṭavārom kalvācal nāṭṭu kulacekarapurattu Iḻaiyā
ttakuṭi nakarattāṟku piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi Innayiṉār tirukkoḻakku
ṭi Āṇṭa tampirāṉāṟku Ivarkaḷ taṉmamākat tirutter vaikkaiyil
Itukku Uṇṭāṉa Aṟaikuṟai nāṅkaḷ Ivarkaḷ kaiyilē paṟṟi koḷḷu
kaiyil Iṉimel Ivarkaḻai Inta tirukko ṟku Uṇṭāṉa poṟkuṭam vaṭam caṭṭai
piṟai kaṇṇāṭi tūkkam maṟṟu Eppeṟppaṭṭaṉavum koyil paṇṭārattile ku
ṟai tittukoḷḷakkaṭavom Ākavum nakarattārṟku tiruttermunṉe parivaṭṭa
mum kaṭṭi tittamum tiruniṟum tirumālaiyum Oṭukkum cantirātittavaṟ cella peṟṟu
ppokak kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Ippaṭikku Iḻaiyāttakkuṭi nakarattāṟku śrī paṇṭāra
k kāryyattukku kaṭavārom māṇikka vācakapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Āllāla cuntarapaṭ
ṭar Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiya piramātaraāyar Eḻuttu māṭāpattiyam toṇṭaimāṉ
piccar Eḻuttu koyil kaṇakku Akaḷaṅkayirar Eḻuttu § naṉm §
Digital edition of SII 39.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
